summary: Backend + Frontend integration verified end-to-end. Backend returns 100 mixed tickets (70 email + 30 slack); all analytics endpoints return aggregated data. Frontend Support Dashboard renders ticket cards (NOT 'No tickets found'), shows both email and slack source tickets, ticket detail panel renders fully. Analytics Dashboard renders all 5 summary cards (Total Issues=100, Active Clients=13, Top Issue=Pincode Serviceability, Top Client=Giva, Avg TAT=36.4h) and all 5 charts including Source Distribution (Email=70, Slack=30). Period filter buttons functional.

issues: Sort/Filter buttons have no data-testid attributes - hampers automation
No data-testid on individual ticket cards or search input - testability gap

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid to ticket cards, sort/filter buttons, search input for better testability
WebSocket on first connect logs 'closed before connection established' once but reconnects successfully - cosmetic only
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py contains 200+ lines of commented-out legacy code at top - cleanup advised
Frontend polls every 30s in addition to WebSocket - may double-fetch; consider disabling poll when WS connected
seed_data_creation: Used pre-seeded 100 tickets (70 email + 30 slack, TEC-1000..TEC-1099) - no new seed required
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 acceptance criteria from the review request verified. Backend: GET /api/health, /api/tickets/, /api/analytics/{summary,source-frequency,brand-frequency} all 200 with correct payloads. Frontend: ticket cards render, slack ticket detail (TEC-1083, source: slack) shown, navigation to Analytics works, all 5 summary cards + 5 charts populated, Email=70 / Slack=30 visible in source-counts.
